details.queryString: fetch dt.entity.service | fields id, tags | expand tags | filter tags == concat("ENVIRONMENT:", "DEV") | fields id | dedup id | join [ fetch dt.entity.service | fields id, tags | expand tags | filter startsWith(tags, "APP:") | fieldsAdd app = replaceString(tags, "APP:", "") | fields id, app ], kind: inner, on: { id } | filter app != "" | fields value = app | dedup value | sort value asc
